name: neon-brawl
description: A lightweight one- or two-player MMA game built with Canvas and JavaScript.

scripts.check: node --check animation-manifest.js && node --check game.js && node --check scripts/png-alpha.cjs && node --check scripts/normalize-support-sheets.cjs && node --check scripts/manage-character-sprites.cjs && node --check scripts/validate-animation-assets.cjs && node scripts/manage-character-sprites.cjs validate && node scripts/validate-animation-assets.cjs
